location: Inside a treasure chest in Castle Ensis: from the Castle Ensis Site of Grace, drop through the hole southwest of the courtyard where Moonrithyll, Carian Knight is fought, follow the path up a waterfall and ladder, then take two lefts and climb stairs to reach the storeroom.
tactics: This is Shadow of the Erdtree DLC content inside Castle Ensis, a mid-sized dungeon in the Land of Shadow's opening area — not present in the base game.
Moonrithyll, Carian Knight patrols the courtyard above; you can often slip past toward the hole without engaging her if you just want the chest.
The route involves a waterfall climb and multiple turns — easy to overshoot the storeroom entrance if you don't watch for the two-left turn described.
lore: A finely made blue shield engraved with a wolf beneath the moon — emblem of the Carian royal covenant — prized for its strength against sorceries.

builds.name: Anti-magic Strength build
builds.why: Notably high magic negation (63) among medium shields, strong pick for a Strength build expecting sorcery-heavy fights in the DLC.
